vague_intent: keep me updated on tech news
true_intent: Give me a short summary of the biggest AI and startup news twice a week — Monday and Thursday mornings — pulled from the web, delivered as an in-app notification. Just reading, nothing to publish.
must_clarify: cadence / how often (no schedule word in the intent, so it must ask)
must_not_assume: a daily cadence (the intent gives no cadence at all — 'updated' is not 'daily')
notes: Sits JUST OUTSIDE the schedule-keyword set in gates.rs (no 'daily/every/each' word), so intent_implies_trigger should be Closed and force a cadence question. Contrast with hn-digest-control which is fully specified. Tests the gate oracle boundary.
